overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character paddling a wooden canoe through a scenic mountain river. The journey begins in a rocky canyon with clear green water, transitions through a boulder field, and continues into a wider forested valley with pine-covered banks and distant mountains under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon river entry with shallow water

events.description: character pushes off from shore and begins paddling canoe into deeper water
canoe moves from shallow shoreline into the main river channel

agents.ego_description: character in canoe pushing off from shore and beginning to paddle downstream through rocky canyon

entered.detail: dark wooden canoe with character wearing hat seated inside
clear greenish water with visible ripples and reflections
large gray boulders forming the riverbank
steep rocky cliff face with sparse vegetation

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a close view of a wooden canoe launching from a rocky shore into a narrow canyon river. The character pushes off with a paddle and begins moving through clear green water, with steep rock walls rising on both sides and the sky partially visible above.

events.description: canoe passes closely alongside a large rock formation on the right
character steers canoe left to navigate around a central boulder

agents.ego_description: character actively paddling and steering the canoe through a field of large rocks and boulders in the river

entered.detail: massive gray rock formation rising from the water center-channel
cluster of medium-sized rocks scattered in the river
distant mountain peaks visible through the canyon opening

segments.scene_description: The canoe navigates through a challenging section of the river filled with large boulders and rock outcrops. The character paddles steadily, steering around obstacles as the canyon walls loom close on both sides. Distant mountains become visible ahead as the canoe progresses through the rocky channel.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest valley river with mountain views

events.description: river widens significantly as canoe exits the rocky canyon into a forested valley
gravel shoreline becomes visible on the left bank as water shallows

agents.ego_description: character paddling steadily downstream through the wide river valley, maintaining a central course

entered.detail: dense evergreen trees covering the left riverbank
rocky and sandy beach area along the water's edge
wide valley opening with layered mountain ridges in the distance

segments.scene_description: The canoe emerges from the rocky canyon into a wide, scenic river valley. The riverbanks are now lined with dense pine forests, and the sky opens up to reveal a partly cloudy afternoon. The character continues paddling steadily toward the distant mountains, passing a gravel shoreline on the left as the river gradually widens and calms.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a wooden canoe travels from a confined rocky canyon into a vast, open river valley. It begins with the canoe launching from a rocky shore into clear green water, moving forward as steep rock walls rise sharply on both sides. As the journey progresses, the camera navigates through a challenging channel of large boulders and outcrops, with the looming canyon walls gradually receding to reveal distant mountains ahead. The scene then opens up as the canoe emerges from the rocks into a wide valley where the riverbanks shift to dense pine forests under a partly cloudy afternoon sky. Finally, the water widens and calms, passing a gravel shoreline as the character paddles steadily toward the far-off peaks.
